PHP 5 to 8 Migration and Rebuild

Posted 27 minutes ago
Worldwide
20 required Connects (216 available)

This is the number of Connects required to submit a proposal for this job.

Learn More

Summary

We are seeking a skilled developer to migrate our PHP 5 platform to PHP 8 and rebuild our personality assessment web app. The project involves upgrading the current system, ensuring compatibility with modern standards, and enhancing user experience. The ideal candidate will have experience in PHP, MySQL, and HTML5, and be able to deliver a seamless and efficient platform.
More than 30 hrs/weekHourly
1 to 3 months1-3 monthsDuration
ExpertI am willing to pay higher rates for the most experienced freelancers
  • Project Type:Complex project

You will be asked to answer the following questions when submitting a proposal:

  1. This project involves migrating a site from PHP 5.2.2 to PHP 8.2+. Have you completed a migration of this scale before? Please briefly describe the project and what the main challenges were.
  2. In plain language, what is a prepared statement and why does it matter? How would you approach securing a legacy PHP application that currently uses mysql_ functions?
  3. he core of this platform is a scoring engine that must produce identical results after the migration — it cannot change behavior in any way. How would you approach modernizing code like this while guaranteeing the output stays the same?
  4. The report needs to be rebuilt as a modular system where each section can be toggled on or off per organization without code changes. How would you approach building something like that?
  5. How do you prefer to communicate with clients during a project — tools, frequency, and format? How do you handle a situation where the project is taking longer than expected?

Skills and experience

Mandatory skills

PHP
JavaScript
HTML5
MySQL
Full-Stack Development
Database Development
HTML5 / CSS3
Chart.js
Web Application Development
PDF Generation

Preferred qualifications

  • Job Success Score:At least 90%
  • Include Rising Talent:Yes
  • English level:Fluent
    Has complete command of this language with perfect grammar
